title: Senior Doctor - Biocon Digital Technologies - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Biocon Digital Technologies - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Biocon Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Indore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Biocon Digital Technologies:
Biocon Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Biocon Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
